expectations.text: Report confirms no contradictions were found
expectations.evidence: Report says 'No contradictions found.' Verdict: 'The three documents are well-aligned.'

expectations.text: Report does NOT fabricate issues that don't exist in the documents
expectations.evidence: Flagged items (numerator range vagueness, first-beat accent rule) are genuine edge cases found in the documents, not fabrications.

expectations.text: Report lists the files that were checked
expectations.evidence: Title includes 'VISION / SPEC / ROADMAP'. Consistency matrix shows all three files.

expectations.text: Report is concise — does not pad a clean result with unnecessary detail
expectations.evidence: Report is structured and ends with a 2-item summary. 5 findings are listed but 3 are explicitly marked as 'None/expected' severity.
